case_title: CITIZENS STATE BANK VS. BRETT K. LAMPORT ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIZENS STATE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAMPORT, BRETT K. LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Respondents Joint Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment(S)
Off Calendar Dec-04-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Valerie A. Bantner Peo, Esq., (415) 227-0900, appearing for Citizens State Bank, Plaintiff
No other appearances.

Hearing held. Ms. Peo stated that she does not contest the tentative ruling.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BRETT LAMPORT, MELISSA LAMPORT Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Respondents Joint Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment(S) is DENIED. Moving party failed to carry its burden under CCP 1710.40(a). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)

Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Respondents Joint Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment(S)
Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Continued To Dec-04-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BRETT LAMPORT, MELISSA LAMPORT Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Respondents Joint Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment(S) is continued to December 4, 2020 on Court's own motion. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Respondents Joint Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment(S)
Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Continued To Dec-01-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Valerie Banter, Esq., 415-227-0900, appearing for Citizens State Bank, Plaintiff
Anthony Ferrigno, Esq., 423-744-4041, appearing for Brett Lamport, Defendant

ARGUED. Both parties stated that they contested to the tentative ruling. Mr. Ferrigno provided background information,reported his efforts in getting courtsey copies to department 501 and requested a new hearing date. The Court questioned if hard copies were delivered. Mr. Ferrigno stated that he was unaware that hard copies need to be hand delivered. Ms. Banter argued how the delay hinders her clients.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT BRETT LAMPORT, MELISSA LAMPORT Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Respondents Joint Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment(S) is continued to December 01, 2020 at 9:00 am in Department 501. Parties waive notice. The moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a hard copy of the moving papers to Department 501. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Respondents Joint Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment(S)
Off Calendar Oct-23-2020 Continued To Nov-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS BRETT LAMPORT, MELISSA LAMPORT'S Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Respondents Joint Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment(S) is continued to November 16, 2020. Moving party to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers no later than October 30, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Copies of opposition and reply received. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Respondents Joint Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment(S)
Off Calendar Oct-08-2020 Continued To Oct-23-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT BRETT LAMPORT, MELISSA LAMPORT Amended Notice Of Hearing Date On Respondents Joint Motion To Vacate Sister State Judgment(S)
is continued to October 23, 2020 per stipulation and order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
